title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cuemath is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
